mojo.reason: Mojo notebook cells need a Mojo compiler/runtime target for WebAssembly. The current Mojo toolchain in this repo exposes no wasm target, so this site leaves Mojo runtime support last.

rust.reason: Rust notebook cells need a self-hosted source-to-execution pack. The available browser rustc.wasm path compiles to objects and still needs a linker/runner, so this site does not ship it yet.
